summary: Linked the Kraid ground/stage object by making src/melee/gr/grkraid.c matching and flipping it from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py. The work combined small MWCC-oriented C rewrites with symbols.txt fixes for rodata/data/sdata/sdata2 scopes, sizes, and alignments, resolving reported string-offset and padding issues around grKr data.

key_files.role: Main matching work: include cleanup plus codegen-sensitive edits in grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FE6D8, and grKraid_801FE818.
Adjusted grKr section symbols: local labels, object sizes, scope changes, exact string offsets, and align:8 markers for following grRc data.

what_changed: Marked melee/gr/grkraid.c as Matching in configure.py.
Added const Vec grKr_803B8278 = { 0.0f, 0.0f, 0.0f } and changed grKraid_801FE440 to initialize Vec pos from that rodata symbol.
Removed helper getMapRotation and expanded its calculation inside grKraid_801FE6D8 using local min and max temporaries.
Added a redundant self-assignment grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min = grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min in grKraid_801FE6D8, matching the PR body's note about a janky offset/codegen hack.

Adjusted grKraid_801FE818 temporary variable ordering, initialized fVar1 and fVar3 together, removed repeated else-side fVar3 assignments, and used an s8 temp initialized through a u8 cast before assigning x2 and x1.
Changed grKr_803B8278 rodata size from 0x10 to 0xC and gave the next grRc rodata symbol align:8.
Split and relabeled grKr .data around 0x803E4D00-0x803E4D8C using local @ labels, including @171 at .data:0x803E4D64, to preserve the needed string offset.
Changed grKr .sdata strings at 0x804D4770 and 0x804D4778 to local @189 and @190 labels, and aligned the following grRc_804D4780 symbol to 8.
Changed grKr sbss symbols grKr_804D6A08 and grKr_804D6A0C from global to local scope.
Changed several grKr sdata2 float/double symbols from named global grKr_* entries to local @ labels with explicit alignments.
smart_moves: Solved the reported string-offset and padding problems mostly in symbols.txt rather than forcing incorrect C-level names or object sizes.
Used local @ labels for compiler-local strings and constants, which better reflects how MWCC-emitted data should be represented.
Adjusted the next-section/next-object alignments, especially align:8 on grRc symbols, to account for padding after shortened or split grKr data.
Converted a stack zero-vector initializer into a named const Vec rodata object, matching the corrected 0xC rodata symbol.
Used small, targeted codegen nudges in grKraid_801FE6D8 and grKraid_801FE818 instead of large rewrites.
decomp_lessons: If a string needs to land at a non-obvious offset such as 0x803E4D64, check whether a surrounding data object should be split and whether the string should be a local @ label instead of a global grKr_* symbol.
For rodata/sdata padding mismatches, inspect symbol size, scope, and following-symbol alignment before changing source semantics.
A three-float Vec constant should occupy 0xC bytes; if the next rodata symbol needs 8-byte alignment, represent that alignment explicitly in symbols.txt.
Compiler-local floats, doubles, and strings in sdata2/sdata are often best represented as scope:local @NNN labels, not named stage globals.
Tiny MWCC matches can depend on helper inlining, temporary variable order, exact signed byte temporaries, chained initialization, and even no-op assignments.
After data and code match, remember to update configure.py so the object is actually linked as Matching.
naming_conventions: Kraid stage symbols and functions use the grKr/grKraid prefix, e.g. grKr_803B8278 and grKraid_801FE6D8.
Compiler-local constants and strings in symbols.txt use @NNN labels with scope:local, e.g. @171 at .data:0x803E4D64.
A local section label can use the ...data.N form, shown by ...data.0 at .data:0x803E4C78.
Adjacent stage objects keep their own prefixes, such as grRc_* for the next symbols after the grKr data block.
Includes were normalized toward path-qualified forward headers such as gr/forward.h and mn/forward.h.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Represented the zero vector as const Vec grKr_803B8278 and loaded it into the local Vec pos.
Inlined getMapRotation into grKraid_801FE6D8 and introduced explicit min/max f32 locals to influence generated code.
Used a redundant self-assignment to grKr_804D6A08->map_rot_spd_min as a deliberate codegen/offset hack noted by the PR author.
Changed grKraid_801FE818 initialization to fVar1 = (fVar3 = 0.0f), preserving compiler-like temporary behavior.
Used s8 iVar plus iVar = (u8) fVar2 before assigning gp->gv.kraid2.x2 and x1.
Set exact symbol scopes and alignments in symbols.txt to make .rodata, .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 match.
review_feedback: The PR body asked for help with a .data string whose intended offset was not coming through, specifically around 0x803E4D64.
The PR body also called out zero-byte padding issues in .sdata and a similar padding issue in .rodata.
The author later edited the PR to say all issues were fixed, crediting 桜 in Discord.
No human GitHub review comments were present in the slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported 4 new matches: grKraid_801FE818, .sdata2, .rodata, and grKraid_801FE6D8, with matched code +800 bytes and linked code +4460 bytes.
follow_up_queries: grKraid_801FE818 s8 iVar u8 cast matching
symbols.txt grKr sdata2 local float double labels
